name: Stairs + 2nd Floor Bathroom
description:
Vacuum all stairs
Remove all trash and replace trash bag
Clean the sink, mirrors, and toilet
Mop the floor
Use brush and bleach to clean the bathtub/shower
Clean glass door

name: Kitchen Fridge and Floor
description:
Remove all expired food from the fridge
Dry up the bottom level of the fridge
Clean the dining table and benches
Mop the floor

name: Meeting Hall and Basement Bathroom
description:
Vacuum the meeting hall
Remove all trash and replace trash bag
Clean the sink, mirrors, and toilet
Mop the floor
Use brush and bleach to clean the bathtub/shower
Clean glass door

name: House Laundry + Supply
description:
Wash and dry all common area laundry:
Bathroom hand towels
Kitchen yellow towels
Meeting room cloth table covers
 Check if there are still toilet paper, paper towel, dishsoap, detergent, dishwasher pods. If not go out and restock at Costco

name: Kitchen Appliances
description:
Replace the aluminum foil for the stove
Clean all small metal parts on the stove
Clean the range hood filter
Clean the microwave
Empty the plastic dish drying rack and clean it

name: Clean the Library
description:
Tidy up the library and make sure all books are put away
Vacuum the floor, dust the windows, and wipe the table

name: Clean the Dining Room
description:
Vacuum and sweep the floor
Wipe the table and tidy up the chairs
